titleStmt.title: SII 15.1: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 1. (B.K. No. 19 of 1927-28.) KARMAḌI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone leaning against the front wall of Sōmēśvara temple.

The inscription commences with the praise of Āhavamalla or Sōmēśvara I who appears to have been the reigning king. It is dated Śaka 981, Vikāri, Vaiśākha śu. 1, Friday, corresponding to 1059 A.D., April 15. The weekday, however, was Thursday.

It registers a gift of money for maintaining a feeding house and for worship and offerings, etc., in the temple of the god Babbalēśvara by Gangeya-jīya of Kadirmiḍi. The gift was made over into the hands of the Two Hundred Mahājanas of Kadirmiḍi who were to utilise only the interest accruing from the amount for the said purpose. The earlier damaged part of the epigraph mentions a previous date, viz., Viḷambi, Māgha and solar eclipse. This corresponds to 1059 A.D., February 15. The gift seems to have been announced formally on this occassion and it might have taken effect actually two months later.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastadharātaḷaṁ nistāra
ttananisi negaḻdanāhavamalla .
damaged
viḷaṁbiva¨rṣada
vacana [.] Ā māghamāsada sū¨ryyagrahaṇadaṁdu kadi¨rmmiḍiya gaṁ
geyajīyar . vṛtta . kṛtavidya mahima niyama prārabdhani
haka tapaṁ yarāgamānvita kaḷātetvajñarācā
yatarōdā¨ryyavinōdigaḷparahita prāraṁbhaprauḍhar
geṁbunnati gaṁgarāsi munipaṁgakkuṁ peṟa¨rggakkume . kaṁ .
gōdānamannadānaṁ bhūdāna hēmadāna yyudiyipa kanyādā
namiva¨rmmāḍi yiṁtive Ādudu paḍeda¨rtthamaṁ kṛtā¨rtthane
Aṁtenisida gaṁgeyajīyar . svastiyamaniyama svādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇa japasamādhiśīlasaṁpannarappa
śrīmat kadi¨rmmiḍiya mahājanaminnū¨rvvarumaṁ barisi dēgulamaṁ
śatrakkaṁ nīme dātāraṁmeṁdu grahaṇa tatkāladoḷ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ
māḍi sakava¨rṣa 981 neya vikāri saṁvatsarada vaiśākha su
ddha 1 sukravāraṁ modalāge poṁge tiṁgaḻge kiṟiya pāga ba
ḍḍi lekkade harisavaḷada baḍḍiya hoṁge divasapaḷaṁ panni¨rvva¨rbrāhma
ṇa¨rgge śatramaṁ naḍayisuvudeṁdu kadi¨rmiḍiyinnū¨rvvara kayya
lśatrakke modalgoṭṭa lokki poṁgadyāṇave¨rppattu . Aṁkadoḷu gadyā 70
babbalēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ pūjāriya kappaḍakkaṁ baḍḍiyoḷ naḍevaṁdu
piriya pāgavaḍḍiyoḷasuvaḍḍiyūriṁge kada ṇa gadyāvi¨rppatteraḍu
Aṁkadoḷu gadyā 22 dēgulada jī¨rṇnoddhārada besakke baḍaṁgiliyyūra mē
gaṇa dusaraṁ gadyāṇaṁ mūvattu ya dusara gadyāṇavi¨rppattu Aṁtu ga
dyāṇavayvattaṁkadūḷaṁ gadyāṇa 50 Iṁtinituṁ dha¨rmamaṁ pratipāḻisidava vā
raṇāsiyalekkōṭi kavileyaṁ dānaṁgeyda phalamidanaḻidavaṁ vāraṇāsi
yalekkōṭi kavileymaṁ brāhmaṇaranaḷida dōṣa . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 15.1 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
